creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: hrs
Date: Tue Jan  1 23:35:09 2013
New Revision: 309795
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309795

Log:
  - Update to 11.87.
  - Add LICENSE.
  
  PR:		ports/174223
  Submitted by:	Jan Henrik Sylvester

Modified:
  head/print/auctex/Makefile
  head/print/auctex/distinfo
  head/print/auctex/pkg-plist

Modified: head/print/auctex/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/print/auctex/Makefile	Tue Jan  1 23:34:55 2013	(r309794)
+++ head/print/auctex/Makefile	Tue Jan  1 23:35:09 2013	(r309795)
@@ -1,13 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	auctex
-# Date created:				21 November 1999
-# Whom:					Martin Kammerhofer
-#
+# Created by: Martin Kammerhofer
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	auctex
-PORTVERSION=	11.86
-PORTREVISION=	7
+PORTVERSION=	11.87
 CATEGORIES=	print elisp
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
@@ -16,6 +11,8 @@ PKGNAMESUFFIX=		-${EMACS_PORT_NAME}
 MAINTAINER=	hrs@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Integrated environment for writing LaTeX using GNU Emacs
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${MKTEXLSR}:${PORTSDIR}/print/teTeX-base
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${MKTEXLSR}:${PORTSDIR}/print/teTeX-base
 

Modified: head/print/auctex/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/print/auctex/distinfo	Tue Jan  1 23:34:55 2013	(r309794)
+++ head/print/auctex/distinfo	Tue Jan  1 23:35:09 2013	(r309795)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (auctex-11.86.tar.gz) = 3fc2cdbc0c8be1d385061ccb2e8c920b57344ea40eb44e014faf501c5d20e43b

+SIZE (auctex-11.87.tar.gz) = 1206073
